title: Minoan
description: Client sided optimized and QOL modpack!
body:
# **🔥Minoan Mod Pack🔥**

![Header Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9jzJam8H/1bff3780fbccb497e599786376a29a860aa66a2d.png)

*Introducing the ultimate Minecraft client-sided mod pack, optimized and designed for version 1.20.1! With over 130+ meticulously selected mods, this pack brings a wealth of quality-of-life improvements and optimization enhancements to your gameplay experience. Gain a slight advantage over other players with features like being able to see mobs and players health, allowing you to strategically plan your moves. Keep tabs on your remaining totems with a convenient display that shows the exact count in your inventory. Prepare to dive into the world of Minecraft like never before, where streamlined gameplay and useful utilities empower you to reach new heights and conquer the challenges that await you!*


## Features
### Built on Fabric
* Compared to Forge, Fabric is lightweight, is better for client sided mods, loads faster, and still has great mod support.
* Client sided so it works on most servers and runs with decent fps!





## FAQ
> Q: Do I need the modpack on the server?
> A: No, the pack works on all servers that allow vanilla clients. A detailed answer and server setup tips are here.

> Q: I have a question that is not on the FAQ, how do I get an answer?
> A: Currently there is no GitHub or Discord for this modpack, so no questions can be answer right now but maybe in the future we will!



## Disclamers
* The modpack has been set up to be compatible with the rules of most public third-party servers, but it is your responsibility to verify whether you are allowed to use it or not. By installing this modpack you agree that the modpack author, the mod developers and Mojang provide no warranties for using this modpack, every action you do with it is your own.

* This modpack is using Starlight for chunk optimization and due to the way it works, disabling (or replacing) the mod will make your existing worlds initially load a bit slower. This is harmless, it simply means the game is calculating the lit up areas again with a different algorithm.

* This modpack is based on [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) for optimization, so you can get more fps!


## How to Install
The guide to install on ATLauncher, BakaXL, MultiMC, and Prism Launcher is right [here](https://docs.modrinth.com/docs/modpacks/playing_modpacks/#how-do-i-play-a-modpack)!

*PS: For a better expirence I reccamend adding [theese mods](https://how.to.minoa.cat/chtmds)...*
